message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker — close storage.rs split phases + ARS decoupling + proptest helper

Round-trips the local beads database to JSONL after multi-agent work on the
storage.rs library-vs-binary split (ft-dn2tu) and adjacent refactors.

Net delta: 8 insertions / 8 deletions — these are in-place JSONL row
replacements (same IDs, updated status/assignee/close_reason fields).

Closures pinned in this sync:

- ft-aw52a (storage.rs Phase 6 — Storage Handle scaffolding, cc5973a37):
  ships the storage/handle/ subdirectory with a per-feature impl-split
  pattern; beachhead extraction is event_mutes.rs (8 cohesive async methods,
  ~108 LOC). Discovery noted: the bead's "46 impl blocks" turned out to be
  one giant impl block post-Phases 1-5, making per-cluster slicing cleaner
  than originally scoped. ~12 follow-up clusters listed in mod.rs.

- ft-iq339 (centralize proptest seq runtime block_on, 0ae8b8d1e): adds
  run_storage_proptest_async<F, T>(future) -> T as multi-thread sibling of
  run_storage_async_test, extending the TLS-destructor-panic guard from
  ft-3tvvt into the proptest layer. prop_seq_monotonic_per_pane,
  prop_fts_finds_inserted_text, prop_fts_respects_pane_scope rewired.

- ft-nsb8c (storage.rs Phase 5 — Export Query extract, e4fc00fb6): moves
  build_export_where + 5 query_export_* fns (~340 LOC) into
  storage/export.rs as a private sibling module. Bonus fix: closes a
  pre-existing test-import gap in recorder_retention.rs left from
  ft-xcsm0. 159 export-related tests passing.

- ft-nsoxc (decouple frankenterm-core-ars from core operational types,
  4f2c62151): severs two of three core-ars→core back-edges by lifting
  mdl_extraction (~1,215 LOC) and token_bucket (~966 LOC) into
  frankenterm-core-audit-types; ARS rewires its imports while frankenterm-
  core preserves the public API via pub-use. workflows back-edge remains
  open as a follow-up (not leaf-clean).

No code changes here — the JSONL is just catching up to the production
commits already on main.
